Bourne End Station - Bourne End

Open now
Open
24/7
Opening hours
Total Spaces
67
Carpark services
Per day
From £3.00
Pricing and payment
Parking tariff

Monday - Friday
Daily Rate before 12pm: £4.00
Daily Rate after 12pm: £3.00

Saturday - Sunday
Daily Rate: £3.00 per day

*Please note normal charges apply on Bank holidays and this car park does not accept card payments

Cashless Parking – APCOA Connect

APCOA Connect is our easy way to pay for parking. Rather than queuing to pay at the payment machines, APCOA Connect allows you to pay for your parking session securely via your mobile phone – no cash, no ticket, no stress.

Download the APCOA Connect App from the  Apple App Store or Google Play Store. 

Use location code 2104 to pay for your parking session.


Blue Badge Holders

All Blue Badge holders need to register their vehicles on APCOA Blue Badge Portal Please ensure that your Blue Badge is always displayed when parking at this station car park. If dedicated Blue Badge bays are occupied, please park within any available space, and display your Blue Badge. You will need to register but parking is still free for Blue Badge holders.

Register on APCOA Blue Badge Portal. 

For further assistance, please   click here to open our user guide.




ScanPay

In a hurry? ScanPay provides a quick and convenient non-registration self-service option for customers who do not want to travel and queue at a payment machine, nor download and register with an app.

Simply scan the QR code displayed on the signage within the car park using your mobile device to conveniently pay for parking, all without the need to register any unnecessary personal details.

Motorcycle Parking

Motorcycles can park for free in designated motorcycle bays. Standard parking charges apply if parked in a regular car space.
